prompt: Look at my current src/components folder. It's just a flat list of 50 files. Help me reorganize it for better scalability.

assertions.name: identifies_flat_list_problem
assertions.text: Does the output identify problems with a flat list of components?

assertions.name: suggests_hierarchical_structure
assertions.text: Does the output suggest a hierarchical or feature-based structure?

assertions.name: follows_output_format
assertions.text: Does the output follow the 3-part structure defined in the skill?
